Shubman Gill Fitness Test Updates Ahead of T20I

Dec 2, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Shubman Gill will undergo a mandatory fitness assessment at Bengaluru’s Centre of Excellence (COE) on Monday as he prepares for India’s five-match T20I series against South Africa starting December 9.

The vice-captain’s fitness status is crucial for the squad, as he missed the second Test and the ongoing ODI series due to a neck injury sustained in Kolkata.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Shubman Gill Fitness Test Updates Ahead of T20I
